channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Alex Ovechkin is expected to miss 4 to 6 weeks with a broken left leg
item.description: Alex Ovechkin has a broken left fibula and is expected to be out four to six weeks, an injury that pauses the Washington Capitals superstar captain’s pursuit of Wayne Gretzky’s NHL career goals record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Clips of Linda McMahon taking violent wrestling slams from massive WWE giants spread amid Trump cabinet pick
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's new secretary of Education, Linda McMahon, was once the subject of violent WWE action, and some of it involved her children.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chris Sale, Tarik Skubal earn first career Cy Young Awards
item.description: Chris Sale of the Atlanta Braves and Tarik Skubal of the Detroit Tigers were named the National League and American League Cy Young Award winners Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Manfred says Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out Rays' ballpark situation
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out the Rays' ballpark situation following Hurricane Milton, and baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred said there has been no thought to allowing the team to explore a relocation.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 20 years later: A look back at the Malice at the Palace
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV) — It has now been 20 whole years since the most infamous night in Indiana Pacers franchise history: The Malice at the Palace. One of the worst brawls in U.S. sports history, the incident occurred on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Legion to play in new stadium next year
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will no longer be the home for the San Diego Legion as the professional rugby team will be heading back to Torero Stadium at the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: BYU and Arizona State both have exceeded expectations
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is still in the College Football Playoffs as of now, but they desperately need a win over #21 Arizona State in Tempe this Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers fall after late TD pushes Seahawks past San Francisco 20-17
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Geno Smith scored on a 13-yard scramble with 12 seconds remaining and the Seattle Seahawks snapped a six-game losing streak against the San Francisco 49ers with a 20-17 victory on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ewers' two touchdowns, Texas' defense lead No. 3 Longhorns past Arkansas 20-10
item.description: Quinn Ewers threw for 176 yards and two touchdowns and No. 3 Texas’ defense clamped down on Arkansas’ final two possessions to help the Longhorns win 20-10 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC W. BOLIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 37, Cavaliers stay perfect and improve to 14-0 with 144-126 win over Bulls
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 37 points, Darius Garland had 29 and the Cleveland Cavaliers continued one of the best starts in league history, improving to 14-0 with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bird, Fowles, Pondexter, Beard headline Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025
item.description: WNBA greats Sue Bird, Sylvia Fowles, Cappie Pondexter and Alana Beard headline the Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025 that was announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mike Tyson concedes the role of villain to young foe in 58-year-old's fight with Jake Paul
item.description: Friendship is at the heart of how a fight came together between 58-year-old former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and much younger YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC
